positive: A vibrant, stylized bioluminescent forest scene viewed from above. The composition features abstract, interconnected glowing flora and crystalline structures forming a symmetrical, mandala-like pattern. Use deep sapphire blues, electric teal, and neon magenta as primary colors, contrasted against stark, matte black backgrounds. The style should be intricate digital linework combined with smooth, glowing gradients, evoking deep-sea life meeting jungle geometry. Focus on strong silhouettes and perfect symmetry, ensuring the entire design is suitable for repeat apparel printing, with clean, high-contrast edges. Cinematic, fantasy concept art, perfect composition, highly detailed, ultra quality.
negative: low quality, grainy, blurry, noise, artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, watermark, text, signature, logo, trademark, copyright, disfigured, messy lines, cluttered background, messy composition
